about.title: About
about.storyText: MyStore is a full-featured shopping cart built with React 18 and TypeScript. It supports three languages (English, French, and Spanish), persists the cart across sessions using localStorage, and includes product search, sorting, and category filtering — all wired up with a responsive navbar that collapses on mobile.
about.missionText: Product translations use a nested locale structure ({ en, fr, es }) rather than flat fields, making it trivial to add new languages. UI strings use i18next with plural rules so item counts read naturally in every locale. React.memo and useMemo keep re-renders minimal as the product list filters and sorts.
about.teamText: Built by Sarah Rehan — a frontend developer focused on accessible, well-tested, and production-ready web applications.

contact.title: Contact
contact.prompt: Have feedback, questions, or ideas for improving the app?
contact.cta: Feel free to reach out — your input helps make this project better.
